title: OntologyLinkType
description: Declares a directed relationship between two ObjectTypes.

is_transitive.description: True when a chain of this link may be walked recursively (e.g. `contains` from subscription to a leaf resource). The traversal engine only recurses when this is true.

is_causal.description: True when this link carries causal semantics (Rule -> Outcome `causes`/`prevents`). T2 reasoning may cite it; deterministic tiers must not treat causality as certainty.

temporal_order.description: True when this link's endpoints have a strict time ordering (Finding `precedes`/`follows`). Queries over the link must respect the timestamp on the endpoints.
